title: Patriarch Filaret Dies at 97, Orthodox Church of Ukraine Says
summary_full: Filaret led a movement in Ukraine that created a schism among Orthodox believers and, ultimately, a church independent of Moscow.
summary_public: Filaret led a movement in Ukraine that created a schism among Orthodox believers and, ultimately, a church independent of Moscow.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: created a schism among Orthodox believers and, ultimately, a church independent of Moscow.
